title: aichryson × aizoides var. domesticum
intro: Aichryson × aizoides var. domesticum, also known as the 'Lithops domesticum', is a rare, hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family, typically grown for its unique and interesting appearance. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to have antimicrobial and antifungal effects, which can be used to treat various skin infections. The health benefits of consuming Aichryson × aizoides var. domesticum are largely unknown, however it is sometimes used in herbal preparations for its potential antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in teas and infusions, or in the form of tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
